overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay showing a character performing parkour stunts on a giant robot statue before flying through the neon-lit skyscrapers of Night City on a futuristic motorcycle. The sequence features high-speed aerial navigation between buildings with vibrant neon lighting and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: giant robot statue rooftop parkour area

events.description: character launches off the statue's shoulder into free flight

agents.ego_description: riding the white futuristic motorcycle in circles around the giant silver statue's head and shoulders before launching into the air

entered.detail: massive metallic humanoid statue with glowing purple eyes holding a pink orb
large spherical light structure held in the statue's right hand
large digital advertisement with purple neon text on building facade
low-rise structures with red canopies at the base of the statue

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the player character riding a white futuristic motorcycle atop a massive silver robot statue in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The camera circles around the statue's head, revealing the sprawling cityscape below before the character launches into the air from the statue's shoulder.

events.description: leaving the statue behind and entering dense urban airspace between skyscrapers
diving down between buildings into narrower corridors

agents.ego_description: flying the motorcycle at high speed through gaps between towering skyscrapers, descending into the urban canyon

entered.detail: tall buildings with reflective glass facades and illuminated windows
multi-level roadways visible beneath the flight path
large yellow advertisement featuring text about Night City
structure with distinctive hexagonal pattern facade

segments.scene_description: The character flies away from the statue into the dense urban core, navigating between glass and steel skyscrapers illuminated by neon advertisements. The perspective shifts to high-speed flight through narrowing aerial corridors between buildings, with elevated highways visible far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon with tight building gaps

events.description: motorcycle changes from white to gold color scheme mid-flight
sharp banked turn through extremely narrow gap between red and white buildings

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the motorcycle through tight spaces between buildings, banking sharply around corners as the vehicle changes to gold color

entered.detail: large advertisement with yellow background and black text passing by closely
tall structure with vertical red and white stripes

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the densest parts of the city, the motorcycle shifts to a gold color scheme while weaving through extremely narrow gaps between skyscrapers. The character passes large holographic billboards at close range and executes sharp turns between the futuristic architecture, with buildings towering on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed trajectory that begins atop a massive monument and plunges into the dense, neon-lit canyons of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with a white motorcycle circling the head of a giant silver robot statue, capturing the sprawling cityscape before the rider launches into the air from the statue's shoulder. As the character flies away from the monument, the scene shifts into a high-speed descent through narrowing aerial corridors of glass and steel, with elevated highways receding far below. The perspective then tightens as the motorcycle transforms to a gold color scheme, weaving through extremely narrow gaps between towering skyscrapers and passing holographic billboards at close range. Finally, the camera executes sharp turns through the densest part of the urban core, surrounded on all sides by vibrant cyberpunk architecture.
